wordingPrinciple: Follow the proven default, or outperform it with a named alternative, measurable success criteria, and runtime evidence.

rules.observedFailure: Redesigns silently removed links, handlers, copy, routes, states, or analytics hooks.
rules.defaultRemedy: Complete and pass the preservation manifest before delivery.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Visually ambitious pages shipped broken navigation, forms, states, focus, or pointer behavior.
rules.defaultRemedy: Pass the functional UX audit with keyboard and pointer evidence.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Desktop effects were cropped, unusable, or absent on touch devices.
rules.defaultRemedy: Ship a deliberate mobile treatment for every page and effect.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Motion-heavy pages ignored user preferences or hid content when animation failed.
rules.defaultRemedy: Ship visible defaults and a tested reduced-motion path.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Traveling decoration and canvases covered text, controls, or pointer targets.
rules.defaultRemedy: Pass the occlusion and pointer-events sweep at desktop and mobile sizes.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Organic real-world subjects built from primitives looked like crude blobs and damaged credibility.
rules.defaultRemedy: Use a real GLB, a photoreal cutout, sourced photography, or remove the claimed object.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: WebGL, video, and scroll effects left blank or broken content when runtime assumptions failed.
rules.defaultRemedy: Ship and exercise loading, context-loss, low-power, and static fallbacks.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Agents claimed checks passed without commands, screenshots, traces, or measurements.
rules.defaultRemedy: Attach structured, auditable proof to every passing verification claim.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Plans promised distinct assets that were missing, duplicated, or never rendered.
rules.defaultRemedy: Reconcile every shipped asset path against the plan and rendered page.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: JS animation and effect layers made content invisible or inaccessible.
rules.defaultRemedy: Content remains visible and usable before enhancement and when effects fail.
rules.exceptionTest: none

rules.observedFailure: Agents repeatedly chose the same training-data fonts using generic clean-and-modern reasoning.
rules.defaultRemedy: Explore at least three candidates, mark reflex fonts, read the recent ledger, and choose a brand-specific voice.
rules.exceptionTest: A reflex font has a specific brand, metric, product, language, variable-font, performance, or supplied-reference reason.

rules.observedFailure: Award builds used a generic orb or had no recurring dimensional system beyond the hero.
rules.defaultRemedy: Plan one concept-specific spatial, media, typographic, or material signature that recurs and changes state.
rules.exceptionTest: A named alternative creates equivalent recurrence, interaction, visual dominance, and journey continuity on desktop and mobile.

rules.observedFailure: Abstract coded spheres, blobs, and toruses were promoted as signature objects and read as generic demos.
rules.defaultRemedy: Promote a recognizable subject; keep abstract geometry supporting-only.
rules.exceptionTest: A brand-native abstract instrument has a nameable function, material identity, recurrence, and input response rather than being ambient decoration.

rules.observedFailure: Award media remained something visitors only watched while the page claimed immersion.
rules.defaultRemedy: Create one concept-specific point where the visitor affects, enters, transforms, or controls the media's visual logic.
rules.exceptionTest: The visitor affects, enters, transforms, scrubs, drags, refracts, or controls the media's visual logic with equal perceptual impact.

rules.observedFailure: Award builds shipped one set-piece while all other key images remained static or used basic fade-and-zoom.
rules.defaultRemedy: Give every key image an explicit flat-or-decompose decision and concentrate meaningful transformation where the narrative changes state.
rules.exceptionTest: A coherent alternative media system makes key imagery intentional while preserving calm sections and asset feasibility.

rules.observedFailure: Multiple sections repeated the same simple reveal or used unrelated effects only to satisfy a catalog.
rules.defaultRemedy: Plan the page as connected visual states with a small number of hero moments, calm sections, and a concept-specific handoff language.
rules.exceptionTest: A coherent signature mechanism develops through materially different states without requiring unrelated mechanisms or gimmick quotas.

rules.observedFailure: Agents converged on the first familiar concept and repeated prior signatures.
rules.defaultRemedy: Use a random provocation to force at least one divergent exploration concept.
rules.exceptionTest: The exploration still records three genuinely divergent, brand-native concepts.

rules.observedFailure: Experimental mode added effects to a conventional page or made every section compete as a technical demo.
rules.defaultRemedy: Explore one non-obvious candidate per major section, then ship only the strongest two or three.
rules.exceptionTest: The plan records hierarchy: selected peaks plus supporting, resting, contrasting, or transforming sections.

rules.observedFailure: Large effect catalogs anchored concepts before the agent understood the brand or assets.
rules.defaultRemedy: Record three original concepts before loading recipe references.
rules.exceptionTest: Early recipe access is limited to feasibility for a user-mandated technique and is recorded explicitly.

rules.observedFailure: Suggested layout families became repeated templates instead of content-shaped compositions.
rules.defaultRemedy: Use layout-family labels to provoke exploration, not as mandatory templates.
rules.exceptionTest: The shipped composition is brand-native, structurally honest, and passes hierarchy and repetition checks.
